commands.purpose: Start the default local factory and dashboard from the current project.
Start or attach to a local factory from an explicit factory directory.
Run a named or portable factory without guessing the local directory layout.
Submit batch JSON as part of local factory startup, not steady-state ingress.
commands.runningFactory: No when used with a startup form such as --dir.

commands.purpose: Submit one work item to a factory that is already accepting work.
Upsert batch JSON to a running factory session.
Check whether a factory host has open sessions before submitting work.
commands.runningFactory: Yes — talks to a running host.

commands.command: you work list / you work show
commands.purpose: Inspect work items from a running factory.
Print packaged reference markdown from the installed binary.
Install the you binary on macOS or Linux from GitHub Releases.
Install the you binary on Windows from GitHub Releases.
